text: {player1}: show the group your most recent photo. Explain it or drink {medium}.
Most controversial opinion wins. Group votes — worst take drinks {small}.
{player1}: read your last DM out loud, or drink {max}.
Hot takes round. Go clockwise — weakest take drinks {medium}.
{player1}: rank everyone by how wild their night would be without inhibitions.
Everyone confesses their most chaotic life decision. Group picks the wildest — they pour a round for everyone.
{player1}: what is the shadiest thing you have ever done? No lying. Drink {sip} first for courage.
Group vote: who is most likely to be a secret millionaire? That person gives out {medium}.
Drink {sip} if your current partner is the best in bed you've ever had. (If they're not — we advise you to pretend!)
Drink {sip} if your last ex was the best in bed you've ever had.
Drink {small} if you've ever had multiple situationships at the same time.
Drink {small} if you've ever hooked up with someone you met through a dating app.
Take as many sips as there are people in this room you'd consider sleeping with.
Drink {small} if you've ever measured yourself or a partner. You know what we mean.
{player1}: take {sip} and let {player2} roast you for 30 seconds.
PUNISHMENT — {player1}: take {max} while everyone insults you for 30 seconds.
The three players voted most stupid take {large}. If you can't reach a majority, {player1} decides.
Everyone pick a new nickname for {player1} — make it dirty, insulting, whatever. Until the end of the night, everyone must use it.
{player1}: who do you think has the face most out of proportion here? They take {small}.
PICONARY! {player1}: draw something ridiculous. Ask a stranger to guess what it is. If they get it, give out {small}. If not, you take them.
{player1}: go barefoot and go ask a stranger for some ice, or take {large}.
The last player to shout "{player1}, lick my balls!" takes {max}.
